text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I did great in the Hyacinth Stakes!<n>But... while I
thought I could run and<n>simp for my Umas without
bothering<n>them, the ones who lost are crying...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't be a spectator if I'm running,<n>and if
someone is going to win a race,<n>that means others
have to lose. It<n>took me too long to realize this, but
I<n>have to set my resolve!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll become better to repay those<n>Umas whose
dreams were broken!<n>I'll show them how strong I
am in my<n>next race, the NHK Mile Cup! I can't
wait!
